title_cn: Starmer 测试英国借贷成本升至 1998 年以来最高
summary: Get caught up.

title: UBS Withholding 22,000 Pages in Nazi Accounts Probe, Investigator Says
title_cn: 调查人员称，瑞银在纳粹账户调查中扣留了 22,000 个页面
summary: UBS Group AG is withholding more than 22,000 pages of documents from an independent probe into Credit Suisse’s handling of Nazi-linked accounts because the bank says they are legally privileged, the lawyer overseeing the investigation has told a US Senate committee.

title_cn: 人工智能热潮推动英镑基础设施跃升至历史新高
summary: Shares of Sterling Infrastructure Inc. hit an all-time high Tuesday following an earnings blowout that was fueled by the race to buildout artificial intelligence infrastructure. Other construction and engineering firms also soared.

title: Fresh AI Disruption Selloff Hits Thomson Reuters Despite Strong Results
title_cn: 尽管业绩强劲，汤森路透仍遭遇新的人工智能颠覆性抛售
summary: Thomson Reuters Corp. shares fell despite positive first-quarter results after Anthropic PBC unveiled new artificial intelligence agents designed to handle a broader mix of financial services tasks.

title: Traders Ramp Up Bets Warsh’s Fed Could Hike Rates Before Cutting
title_cn: 交易员加大押注沃什领导的美联储可能在降息前加息
summary: Bond traders are boosting wagers that the Federal Reserve’s next policy move could be an interest rate hike rather than a cut.

title: Charlotte Airport Gets Approval For $215 Million in Financing
title_cn: 夏洛特机场 2.15 亿美元融资获批
summary: Charlotte received the green light on Tuesday to issue $215 million in revenue bonds that will finance a new runway at Charlotte Douglas International Airport.

title: US Long Bonds Rebound as Buyers Snap Up Rare 5% Yields
title_cn: 由于买家抢购罕见的 5% 收益率，美国长期债券反弹
summary: US long bonds rebounded, sending the 30-year yield back below 5%, as investors look to lock in long-term interest rates trading around multi-year highs.

title: Stocks Rise to Record and Oil Falls as Truce Holds: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着休战的进行，股市上涨至创纪录水平，油价下跌：市场结束
summary: Relative calm returned to global markets, with stocks rising and oil falling as signs that a US-Iran ceasefire is still in place reduced fears about a full-scale war that could hamper the economic outlook.

title: Ambev Soars Most Since 1999 as Brazil Beer Boosts Earnings
title_cn: 巴西啤酒带动盈利，Ambev 股价自 1999 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Shares of Ambev SA, the Brazilian unit of Anheuser-Busch InBev NV, soared the most in over 27 years after stronger-than-expected beer volumes in the South American nation drove a beat in first quarter earnings.

title: Japan Has Two More Windows for Yen Intervention by IMF Rules
title_cn: 日本还有两个根据国际货币基金组织规则干预日元的窗口
summary: Japan can conduct only two more sessions of three-day interventions by November if it wants to maintain its status of having a freely floating exchange rate, based on International Monetary Fund guidelines.

title: US Stocks Close at Record High, Powered by Rallying Chipmakers
title_cn: 在芯片制造商反弹的推动下，美国股市收于历史新高
summary: US stocks set a record closing high on Tuesday, buoyed by semiconductor and memory stocks with sentiment improving broadly as the US-Iran ceasefire appeared to hold.

title: Gold Advances as US-Iran Truce Holds After Hormuz Flareup
title_cn: 霍尔木兹爆发后，美伊休战得以维持，金价上涨
summary: Gold advanced as signs that a US-Iran ceasefire is still in place reduced fears about a full-scale war, helping to temper concerns about surging inflation.

title: Strategy Survives Another Bitcoin Crash With More Alchemy
title_cn: 策略通过更多炼金术在另一场比特币崩盘中幸存
summary: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin accumulation firm Strategy Inc. has survived yet another crypto market meltdown with some fresh financial engineering.

title: Barings CEO: We’ve Got to Underwrite Through Uncertainty
title_cn: 巴林银行首席执行官：我们必须在不确定性下承保
summary: Barings Chairman & CEO Mike Freno discusses navigating through market uncertainty, building a business with both public and private capabilities, and implementing a ‘holistic’ M&A strategy. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The US is Trying To Force Iran's Hand
title_cn: 美国正试图迫使伊朗采取行动
summary: Can Trump’s Project Freedom work in the Strait of Hormuz? Bloomberg Opinion columnist explains using the high-risk, high-reward plan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Embrace AI or Get Left Behind: Job Cuts Sweep Through Crypto Firms
title_cn: 拥抱人工智能，否则就会落后：加密货币公司纷纷裁员
summary: A spate of AI-tinged job cuts at crypto and payments companies has brought up a curious question for analysts and investors: how does one assess whether the artificial intelligence part is real?

title: Saudi Arabia Sees Widest Deficit Since 2018 on More Spending
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯因支出增加而出现 2018 年以来最严重赤字
summary: Saudi Arabia’s fiscal deficit widened in the first quarter to the highest level since 2018 as spending on projects to diversify the economy continued to rise.

title: Oil Declines as Fragile Truce Holds Following Hormuz Clashes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突后脆弱的休战维持，油价下跌
summary: Oil fell as the four-week ceasefire in the Middle East held on Tuesday, after clashes in the Strait of Hormuz and strikes on the United Arab Emirates triggered a jump in prices a day earlier.

title: Mexico’s MIP Seeking to Invest $12 Billion for Infrastructure
title_cn: 墨西哥 MIP 寻求投资 120 亿美元用于基础设施
summary: Mexican infrastructure investment manager MIP Real Assets is seeking to invest more than $12 billion for projects involving renewable energy and highways in Mexico, one of the most ambitious private-sector programs yet as President Claudia Sheinbaum pushes for more development.

title: Saudi Arabia Cuts Oil Prices for June From Record-High Premium
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯将 6 月份油价从创纪录的高溢价下调
summary: Saudi Arabia cut the price of its main oil grade for Asia next month from a record-high in May, though it remained near historic levels as the war in the Middle East continues to severely disrupt supplies.

title: TCW's Katie Koch Sees No Reason to Panic Over Private Credit
title_cn: TCW 的 Katie Koch 认为没有理由对私人信贷感到恐慌
summary: TCW President and CEO Katie Koch says she sees "tremendous opportunity" in the private credit market. Speaking at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California, Koch discusses the landscape for the asset management industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LIV Golf Taps Advisers to Find New Investors After PIF’s Exit
title_cn: PIF 退出后，LIV Golf 聘请顾问寻找新投资者
summary: LIV Golf has tapped law firm Gibson Dunn & Crutcher to advise it in an effort to turn around a loss-making business and find investors to fill the gap left by Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Stephen Jen Warns of Fiscal Risk to US Dollar, Bond Haven Status
title_cn: Stephen Jen 警告美元和债券避风港地位面临财政风险
summary: Washington’s spending spree endangers the global status of the dollar as a reliable safe haven, according to Eurizon SLJ Capital’s Stephen Jen.

title: Macron Ally Moulin Named to Head France’s Central Bank
title_cn: 马克龙盟友穆兰被任命为法国央行行长
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron nominated Emmanuel Moulin, one of his closest advisers, to run the Bank of France.

title: US Natural Gas Futures Fall on Lower Supply to LNG Export Plants
title_cn: 由于液化天然气出口工厂供应减少，美国天然气期货下跌
summary: US natural gas futures ended lower on a decline in flows to liquefied natural gas export terminals, leaving more supply within the domestic market where stockpiles are already well above the five-year average.

title: US Says Iran Ceasefire in Place After Clashes Over Hormuz
title_cn: 美国称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡冲突后停火
summary: The US played down the prospect of a return to active war with Iran after a day of clashes involving ships in the Strait of Hormuz and missile strikes against the United Arab Emirates, while Iran’s president said American demands are “impossible.”

title: Bank of America Says US Can Lower Debt Cost by Going Bespoke
title_cn: 美国银行表示美国可以通过定制来降低债务成本
summary: The US government can mitigate the effect of rising long-term Treasury yields on its cost of borrowing by taking a page from the credit markets, according to Bank of America Corp. strategists.

title: Aluminum Jumps the Most in Three Weeks as US-Iran Truce Holds
title_cn: 随着美伊停战协议的达成，铝价三周内涨幅最大
summary: Aluminum jumped the most in three weeks, leading other base metals higher, with signs of a US-Iran truce still holding and easing market fears of a full-blown war dragging down global economic growth.

title: JPMorgan Sees Higher NYC Downgrade Risk Amid Tax Pushback
title_cn: 摩根大通认为纽约市因税收推迟而面临更高的降级风险
summary: New York City’s risk of seeing a credit-rating downgrade has increased, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co. strategists.

title: Brazil Nears Its China Beef Quota in Big Shift to Trade Flow
title_cn: 巴西接近中国牛肉配额，贸易流发生重大转变
summary: The world’s top beef exporter Brazil is close to reaching its annual quota for shipments to its biggest buyer China, a situation that’s set to redraw trade flows at a time when global consumers are facing higher meat prices.

title: Why China Blocked Meta’s $2 billion Acquisition of Manus AI
title_cn: 为什么中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购 Manus AI
summary: Beijing blocked Meta’s $2 billion Manus deal. On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, we discuss what the fallout means for Chinese AI startups with global ambitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AMD Gives Upbeat Forecast After AI Data Center Demand Surges
title_cn: AI 数据中心需求激增后 AMD 给出乐观预测
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the second-biggest maker of computer processors, gave a strong forecast for the current period, showing that it’s cashing in on the flood of AI spending.

title: Goldman's Minnis on How AI Is Impacting Private, Public Markets
title_cn: 高盛的明尼斯谈人工智能如何影响私人和公共市场
summary: Christina Minnis, Goldman Sachs global head of the Alternatives Origination Group, discusses the transformative impact of AI on both private and public markets during an interview at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Super Micro Gives Profit Outlook Signaling Costs Under Control
title_cn: Super Micro给出利润展望，表明成本得到控制
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. gave a forecast for profit in the current quarter that topped analysts’ estimates, signaling the company is controlling the costs of getting its powerful AI servers into customers’ hands.

title: Tinder Returns to New User Registration Growth in Sign of Turnaround
title_cn: Tinder 新用户注册量恢复增长，出现好转迹象
summary: Match Group Inc. reported first-quarter revenue that beat analysts’ estimates as a decline in Tinder users moderated, suggesting its turnaround strategy is resonating with younger daters.

title: Intel’s VC Arm Backs QuantWare, a Dutch Startup Making Quantum Computing Chips
title_cn: 英特尔风险投资部门支持荷兰量子计算芯片初创公司 QuantWare
summary: Dutch startup QuantWare is raising €152 million ($178 million) in a round led by Intel Corp.’s venture capital arm to build a production facility for quantum computing processors.

title: Guggenheim’s Schwartz Warns Power Crunch Imperils US in AI Race
title_cn: 古根海姆的施瓦茨警告说，电力紧缩将危及美国的人工智能竞赛
summary: Guggenheim Partners Executive Chair Alan Schwartz warned that the US risks falling behind in artificial intelligence development if it fails to address critical infrastructure challenges facing the nation’s electrical grid.

title: Bondholders Move to Resist Covenant Stripping From Lumen’s Qwest
title_cn: 债券持有人采取行动抵制从 Lumen 的 Qwest 中剥离契约
summary: Some bondholders to Lumen Technologies’ Qwest Corp. unit have organized with law firm Davis Polk & Wardwell after the enterprise network giant kicked off a debt swap that would remove their lender protections, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Thoma Bravo Is `Model Agnostic,' Says Boro
title_cn: Boro 表示 Thoma Bravo 是“模型不可知论者”
summary: Thoma Bravo is model agnostic when it comes to AI models and has relationships with OpenAI and Anthropic as well as Google, says the company’s managing partner Seth Boro. Boro discusses AI cybersecurity and deployment costs with Bloomberg’s Dani Burger at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Los Angeles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Billionaire Mark Stevens Gives $200 Million to Alma Mater USC for AI Research
title_cn: Nvidia 亿万富翁 Mark Stevens 向母校南加州大学捐赠 2 亿美元用于人工智能研究
summary: Billionaire Nvidia Corp. director Mark Stevens and his wife Mary are gifting $200 million to the University of Southern California to advance AI research and education across the school.

title: GameStop CEO Sees New Target, Possible Payday in eBay
title_cn: GameStop 首席执行官看到 eBay 的新目标和可能发薪日
summary: The CEO who helped define the meme-stock era has proposed a brash, unsolicited $56 billion offer for the online commerce company. Cecilia D'Anastasio has more (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Guggenheim's Schwartz Says US Power Crunch Hurts AI Push
title_cn: 古根海姆的施瓦茨表示美国电力紧缩损害了人工智能的发展
summary: The US risks falling behind in development of artificial intelligence because of the need to upgrade the electricity grid, Guggenheim Capital Executive Chair Alan Schwartz says. He speaks with Bloomberg's Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pinterest Sees Payoff From Custom AI
title_cn: Pinterest 看到了定制人工智能的回报
summary: Pinterest's first-quarter sales topped analysts' estimates as the platform leaned into the use of its own custom AI models to drive down costs and increase user engagement. Pinterest CEO Bill Ready joins Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Coinbase CEO Announces Job Cuts, Mallers Backs Twenty One Merger Plan | Bloomberg Crypto 5/5/2026
title_cn: Coinbase 首席执行官宣布裁员，Mallers 支持二十一个合并计划 |彭博加密货币 5/5/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Former Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin, Strike CEO and Twenty One Capital Co-Founder & CEO Jack Mallers, Franklin Templeton Head of Digital Assets & Innovation Sandy Kaul, and Stellar Development Foundation CEO Denelle Dixon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brockman Says Musk’s Lack of AI Knowledge Was Concern at OpenAI
title_cn: 布罗克曼表示 OpenAI 担心马斯克缺乏人工智能知识
summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman testified that Elon Musk called a ChatGPT predecessor “stupid,” and told the researchers developing the model that “kids on the internet could do a better job of it,” raising concerns among his co-founders that the billionaire lacked the patience to run the company.

title: PayPal, Coinbase Announce Layoffs as AI Impact Bites
title_cn: 受 AI 影响，PayPal 和 Coinbase 宣布裁员
summary: Software shares continue to feel the impact of AI uncertainty, with news coming out about job cuts at PayPal and Coinbase as well as disappointing commercial sales from Palantir. Lauren Webster, managing director in the technology investment banking group at Piper Sandler, discusses the market moves with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Berkshire Hathaway Idea for Twenty One Capital: Mallers
title_cn: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司的“二十一资本”理念：Mallers
summary: Jack Mallers, co-founder and CEO of Twenty One Capital, joins Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Tether has proposed that Twenty One Capital merge with Strike, a crypto trading and spending platform, and Elektron Energy, a Bitcoin mining firm, at a time when Twenty One Capital’s main business of investing in Bitcoin has fallen out of favor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Guggenheim's Schwartz Concerned Private Credit Will Crack
title_cn: 古根海姆施瓦茨关注的私人信贷将崩溃
summary: Alan Schwartz, executive chair of Guggenheim Partners, discusses surging US power demand from electrification and AI, arguing data centers and hyperscalers should be seen as partners in lowering long‑term electricity costs. Speaking at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California, Schwartz also addresses the recent concerns about the private credit market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI to Spend $50 Billion on Computing in 2026, Brockman Says
title_cn: 布罗克曼表示，OpenAI 将在 2026 年在计算方面花费 500 亿美元
summary: OpenAI expects to spend $50 billion on computing power this year to support its artificial intelligence software, according to co-founder and President Greg Brockman.

title: Tokenized Money Market Growth Will Explode: Kaul
title_cn: 考尔：代币化货币市场将呈爆炸式增长
summary: Sandy Kaul, head of innovation at Franklin Templeton and Denelle Dixon, CEO of Stellar Development Foundation, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The firms recently marked the five year anniversary of the Franklin OnChain US Government Money Fund (Ticker: FOBXX). The suite of tokenized funds recently reached $2 billion in assets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Coinbase to Cut 14% of Staff, Citing Volatile Markets and AI
title_cn: Coinbase 以动荡的市场和人工智能为由裁员 14%
summary: Crypto exchange Coinbase Global Inc. will cut around 14% of its workforce, citing a need to manage costs in volatile markets and technological advances in artificial intelligence. Around 700 employees will be affected by the changes, with cuts expected to happen mostly in the second quarter, and the company expects to incur as much as $60 million in restructuring expenses. Bloomberg's Paul Gulberg joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet Returns to Euro Debt Market for Latest AI Megabond Deal
title_cn: Alphabet 重返欧元债券市场进行最新人工智能超级债券交易
summary: Alphabet Inc. needs to borrow heavily to fund investments in artificial intelligence, and it’s increasingly tapping every market to do so.

title: Coinbase to Cut 14% of Staff, Citing Markets and AI
title_cn: Coinbase 以市场和人工智能为由裁员 14%
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Crypto exchange Coinbase will cut around 14% of its workforce, citing a need to manage costs in volatile markets and technological advances in artificial intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CoreWeave Gets Lower Costs on $3.1 Billion Loan as Demand Surges
title_cn: 随着需求激增，CoreWeave 降低了 31 亿美元贷款的成本
summary: CoreWeave Inc. has secured lower borrowing costs on a first-of-its-kind $3.1 billion loan backed by customer contracts for microchips, benefiting from strong investor demand for artificial intelligence exposure.

title: AMD Shares ‘Priced for Perfection’ After Best Month in 25 Years
title_cn: AMD 股价在经历 25 年来最好的一个月后“定价完美”
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. is coming off its best month in the stock market since the dot-com era, and with the chipmaker’s first-quarter earnings due after the bell, investors will get a chance to see whether its shares have gotten ahead of its fundamentals.

title: Apple Weighs Using Intel, Samsung to Build Device Processors
title_cn: 苹果考虑使用英特尔、三星来制造设备处理器
summary: Apple has held exploratory talks about using processors from Intel and Samsung in the iPhone maker’s devices. Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman explains why Apple is looking for a secondary option beyond longtime partner Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing. He joins Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Weighs Using Intel, Samsung Processors | Bloomberg Tech 5/5/2026
title_cn: 苹果考虑使用英特尔、三星处理器彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 5 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses Apple’s exploratory discussions with Intel and Samsung to build their processors for its US devices. Plus, Alphabet, Microsoft, and xAI have agreed to give the US government early access to their models for review before a public release, joining OpenAI and Anthropic. And, Pinterest CEO Bill Ready explains how its fit-for-purpose AI is helping the platform boost sales.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple to Let Users Choose Rival AI Models Across Its iOS 27 Features
title_cn: 苹果将​​允许用户在其 iOS 27 功能中选择竞争对手的人工智能模型
summary: Apple Inc. will let users choose from a range of outside artificial intelligence services to power features across its software, building on a strategy to turn its devices into a comprehensive AI platform.

title: Iowa Returns to its Battleground Status for the Midterm Elections
title_cn: 爱荷华州重返中期选举战场地位
summary: Republican dominance in the state is under threat in the midterm election campaign.

title: US Approves $374 Million Sale of Guided Bomb Kits For Ukraine
title_cn: 美国批准向乌克兰出售价值3.74亿美元的制导炸弹套件
summary: The State Department has approved Ukraine’s request to purchase up to $374 million worth of GPS-guided bomb kits, according to an announcement Tuesday.

title: Griffin Says He’s Doubling Down on Miami Amid Mamdani Feud
title_cn: 格里芬表示，在与马姆达尼的不和中，他将加倍投资迈阿密
summary: Ken Griffin said he plans to make Citadel’s Miami tower even bigger after New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani name-checked the billionaire in his pledge to charge more taxes on second homes.

title: Merz Rules Out Minority Government, Election as Coalition Stalls
title_cn: 梅尔茨排除少数派政府的可能性，选举因联盟陷入停滞
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz ruled out the possibility of forming a minority government amid a possible breakup of his current two-party coalition, which has slid into a crisis only a year after taking power.

title: Pfizer CEO on Drug Pipeline, Trump's Pick to Lead CDC
title_cn: 辉瑞首席执行官谈药品管道，特朗普选择领导疾病预防控制中心
summary: Pfizer Inc. Chief Executive Officer Albert Bourla says President Donald Trump's nominee to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention is a good choice. Bourla says Erica Schwartz is a “very credible scientist." Bourla also talks about earnings, their drug pipeline and doing business in China. He speaks to Bloomberg's David Westin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why US Troops Are Training in Panama
title_cn: 美军为何在巴拿马训练
summary: After 25 years, American soldiers are back in Panama to train in the jungle alongside local forces. It's part of President Donald Trump's aggressive push to secure "American dominance" in the region. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Says His Trip to Vatican Was Planned Before Trump Dustup
title_cn: 卢比奥表示他的梵蒂冈之行是在特朗普争吵之前计划的
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said his upcoming trip to Rome and the Vatican was planned before President Donald Trump got into a spat with Pope Leo XIV, characterizing the visit as part of regular engagement with the Holy See.

title: Artemis II Proved That Space Innovation Is Possible In Mainstream, Says Bridgit Mendler
title_cn: 布里吉特·门德勒说，阿耳忒弥斯二号证明了太空创新在主流中是可能的
summary: Bridgit Mendler, Northwood founder and CEO, said that her company is aimed at creating communications networking infrastructure for the whole space industry, so that companies aiming to get to space can spend less time and money on communications and more time on innovation.  Mendler said that the world is opening up its excitement around space innovation and that the Artemis NASA mission proved that similar missions can be possible on a mainstream level. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Griffin Says NYC's Mamdani Doesn't Welcome Success
title_cn: 格里芬表示纽约市的马姆达尼不欢迎成功
summary: Citadel founder Ken Griffin says it's clear that New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani doesn't welcome success because he wants to put special taxes on billionaires. Griffin spoke Tuesday during an interview at the Milken Global Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Says US Operation in Hormuz Strait Is Defensive in Nature
title_cn: 卢比奥称美国在霍尔木兹海峡的行动本质上是防御性的
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio emphasized that the move to give military support to ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz near Iran is a “defensive operation,” saying the US will only fire if fired upon.

title: US Authorizes Venezuela to Hire Advisers for Debt Talks
title_cn: 美国授权委内瑞拉聘请顾问进行债务谈判
summary: The US government authorized Venezuela to hire advisers for potential debt talks, a key step in the long-awaited path to restructure the country’s $60-billion pile of defaulted bonds. The notes soared after the announcement.

title: Industry Leaders Look for Energy Solutions at Milken | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/5/2026
title_cn: 行业领导者在米尔肯寻找能源解决方案|权力平衡：早期版本 5/5/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg's Joe Mathieu and Carol Massar discuss how industry is searching for answers to affordability crises as war impacts critical supply chains. On today's show, president and CEO of the Center for American Progress Neera Tanden, Free Russia Foundation Vice President Vladimir Kara-Murza, chief at Zelle Denise Leonhard, CEO of Nuclear Energy Institute Maria Korsnick,  US Chamber of Commerce president Suzanne Clark, and Northwood founder and CEO Bridgit Mendler.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Griffin Says Mamdani Made It Clear That He Needs to Double Down on Miami
title_cn: 格里芬表示曼达尼明确表示他需要在迈阿密加倍努力
summary: Citadel founder Ken Griffin says New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has proven that he made the right choice in moving from Chicago to Miami. “What the mayor of New York has made clear to my partners, and principally my New York partners, is that we need to double down on our bet in Miami," Griffin said during an interview at the Milken Global Conference. He also wouldn't say if he's going to finish building a new tower in Manhattan at 350 Park Avenue. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Xi ‘Respectful’ on Iran, Downplays Strains
title_cn: 特朗普称习近平对伊朗“尊重”，淡化紧张局势
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would discuss the Iran war with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping during their summit next week and sought to downplay tensions over the conflict.

title: Trump Administration 'Sympathies' Are With Putin, Says Kara-Murza
title_cn: 卡拉穆尔扎表示，特朗普政府对普京表示“同情”
summary: Vladimir Kara-Murza, vice president of the Free Russia Foundation, said as long as Russia remains a dictatorship under Vladimir Putin it will be a threat to Europe and the rest of the world. Kara-Murza said that the 'sympathies' of the Trump White House are with Putin, despite the President's claims that he is keeping pressure on Putin to end the war in Ukraine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Seeks Support Via the UN to Break Iran’s Hormuz Chokehold
title_cn: 美国寻求联合国支持以打破伊朗对霍尔木兹的封锁
summary: The US and its allies are pushing a draft United Nations Security Council resolution that would open the door to sanctions or even military action if Iran doesn’t ease its chokehold over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: SEC Unveils Plan to Let Companies Move to Semiannual Reports
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会公布让公司转向半年度报告的计划
summary: US companies could choose to report earnings semiannually instead of quarterly under a proposal released by the Securities and Exchange Commission, potentially reducing how much information publicly traded firms must share with investors.

title: Border Czar Sees New York ICE Surge as Hochul Pushes Cooperation Curbs
title_cn: 随着 Hochul 推动合作限制，边境沙皇看到纽约 ICE 激增
summary: New York’s push to limit state cooperation with federal immigration authorities will trigger a surge in enforcement activity, with more agents deployed into communities and an increase in arrests beyond initial targets, said White House border czar Tom Homan.

title: Iran Will Control Hormuz When War Is Over, Hochstein Says
title_cn: 霍赫斯坦称，战争结束后伊朗将控制霍尔木兹
summary: Former Middle East Senior Advisor to President Biden Amos Hochstein joins Bloomberg at the Milken Institute Global Conference to discuss the war in Iran. He says we're going towards a cliff on oil and oil products by the end of this month and that the bite will deepen every day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vornado CEO Appeals to Mamdani After Mayor’s Griffin ‘Blunder’
title_cn: 市长格里芬“失误”后，沃纳多首席执行官向马姆达尼提出上诉
summary: Vornado Realty Trust Chief Executive Officer Steven Roth appealed to Zohran Mamdani to be more welcoming to businesses after a video by the New York City mayor caused Citadel to threaten to pull out of a new tower on Park Avenue.

title: US Army Wants Its Weapons Systems to Talk to Each Other
title_cn: 美国陆军希望其武器系统能够相互通信
summary: Army Secretary Dan Driscoll is assembling top defense contractors as well as Palantir Technologies Inc. and Anduril Industries Inc. in a bid to get their weapons to communicate better with each other and to more closely integrate AI.

title: Trump Says US Has 'Total Control' Over Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 特朗普称美国“完全控制”霍尔木兹海峡
summary: President Donald Trump says the US has "total control" of the Strait of Hormuz and Iran wants to make a deal to end the war. He speaks in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Strait of Hormuz Has Become a Weapon of War
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡如何成为战争武器
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf. Most of this energy can only be exported aboard tankers that cross the Strait of Hormuz — a waterway that’s effectively been blocked for more than two months.

title: SEC Unveils Proposal for Semiannual Reporting
title_cn: SEC 公布半年度报告提案
summary: US companies could choose to report earnings semiannually instead of quarterly under a proposal released by the Securities and Exchange Commission. Bloomberg Intelligence's Nathan Dean has more on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia’s Kirishi Refinery, Oil Station
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯基里什炼油厂和油站
summary: Ukraine said that it hit a Russian export-oriented refinery and oil-pumping station in Kirishi near the Baltic coast, as Kyiv ramps up attacks ahead of planned Victory Day ceasefires.

title: South Africa Moves to Quell Fallout From Anti-Immigrant Attacks
title_cn: 南非采取行动平息反移民袭击的影响
summary: South Africa’s foreign ministry is stepping up diplomatic efforts to quell growing concern on the continent about rising anti-immigrant sentiment in the country.

title: Canadian Gold Miner Halts Trading Again as Project Blocked
title_cn: 加拿大金矿公司因项目受阻再次停止交易
summary: Canada’s Goldquest Mining Corp. halted trading of its shares for a second time this week, after the Dominican Republic suspended operations at its Romero gold mine project in the wake of mass protests.

title: EU Tells US Trade Deal Should be Adopted by July Deadline
title_cn: 欧盟告诉美国贸易协议应在七月截止日期前通过
summary: The European Union wants the main parts of a US trade deal adopted by July, as it pushed Washington to respect previous commitments made under the pact.
